description: Lateral track camera path presets -- lateral_track_left (camera translates along negative X-axis, looking slightly ahead) and lateral_track_right (mirror). Cinematic tracking shots. Defines position(t), lookAt(t), easing defaults, compatible geometries, and oversizing requirements (significant X-axis oversizing needed).
notes: Tier 2 camera path. Currently a leaf node -- no tuning objective directly references lateral tracks. Spec complete: two presets (lateral_track_left, lateral_track_right), 6-unit X displacement, static lookAt with 1-unit lead, FOV 50, ease_in_out default, recommendedOversizeFactor 2.5 (covers 9:16 portrait + lookAt rotation sweep). Compatible with stage, canyon, diorama, portal, panorama.
